directive_events.owner_directive: Authorized: fix the global Stop so cancelling a workflow terminates every external process an app block launched (PTY agents and external GUI apps such as Fiji), not just the worker.
directive_events.reason: Owner explicitly authorized admin-approved:core-change for bug 6 (global Stop must terminate every external process an app block launched: PTY agents and external GUI apps like Fiji). Fix touches protected engine/scheduler and app-block runtime.

directive_events.owner_directive: Bug 6: only make Stop responsive (no external-process kill). Bug 4 also: small->fullscreen resize must make the agent TUI redraw to fill the enlarged PTY.
directive_events.reason: Owner narrowed bug 6: do NOT kill external processes; only fix the post-Stop unresponsiveness (UI hangs on the worker terminate grace period). Fix is frontend-only optimistic feedback - no protected engine/blocks change. The previously authorized admin-approved:core-change is therefore no longer needed for this PR. Owner also extended bug 4: resizing a PTY from small to fullscreen grows the PTY but the TUI content stays small (resize/refit not propagating).

owner_directive: Fix a batch of alpha-test bugs in ONE PR: (1) workflow execute 500 on validation failure should be 4xx; (3) AI block port editor only offers DataObject instead of all DataObject subtypes; (4) claude-code TUI garbled in PTY; (5) AI block prompt never submitted after spawn (claude-code/codex); (6) Stop on app/AI block hangs and does not kill the child. Image previewer (bug 2) is OUT OF SCOPE here: it belongs to the decoupled scistudio-blocks-imaging package; core must have no image support.
